hero.title: {{babyName}} is in a good rhythm today.
hero.subtitle: The next optimal sleep window is approaching. Start a calm routine shortly before the predicted time.
hero.aiDescription: The prediction uses the latest sleep records and the baby's age.
hero.basedOnAge: The prediction uses the baby's age and latest recorded sleep.

dashboard.heroTitle: Everything important about your baby's day in one place.
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Track sleep, feeding and daily activities without the complexity.

dashboard.noFeedingSevenDays: There is no feeding data for the last 7 days yet.

ai.title: {{name}}'s day at a glance
ai.napOverdue: The predicted nap window has passed
ai.napSoon: The recommended nap window is approaching
ai.sleepGood: Sleep is above the recent average
ai.feedingOverdue: No feeding has been logged for several hours
ai.feedingLonger: The current feeding interval is longer than usual
ai.diaperOverdue: No diaper change has been logged for several hours
ai.diaperSoon: The current diaper interval is longer than usual
ai.medicineSoon: A medication reminder is coming soon
ai.excellentDay: Excellent day. Keep the current routine.

sleep.title: Sleep Tracker
sleep.invalidStartTime: The start time cannot be in the future.

sleep.insightPeriodPattern: Wake windows have been longer in the {{period}}.
sleep.insightCurrentLonger: The current wake period is longer than the recent average.
sleep.insightNeedMoreData: More sleep records are needed for a personalized prediction.

navigation.premiumDescription: AI insights, predictions and smart notifications.

babyProfile.title: Baby profile
babyProfile.description: Keep everything important about your little one in one calm place.
babyProfile.correctedAgeUnavailable: Corrected age is informational and not medical guidance.
babyProfile.quickSummary: A simple snapshot of your baby's profile.
babyProfile.avatarPlaceholder: A warm profile for your baby
babyProfile.name: Name
babyProfile.deleteMessage: This removes only the local profile. Activity records are never deleted silently.
babyProfile.deleteRestricted: This baby has local activity history. Delete or export those records before deleting the profile.
babyProfile.validationBirthdayFuture: The birthday cannot be in the future.
babyProfile.validationGestationalRange: Gestational week must be between 22 and 42.
babyProfile.validationWeightRange: Birth weight must be between 0 and 20 kg.
babyProfile.validationHeightRange: Birth height must be between 0 and 120 cm.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalise BabyNest to fit your routine
settings.description: Adjust language, time and date preferences, units, appearance and reminders so the app feels familiar.
settings.notificationsHint: These preferences control which saved reminders may emit browser notifications.
settings.clearDataHint: Type “clear all” to remove all local data from this device.
settings.importInvalid: The selected file is not a valid BabyNest export.
settings.importConfirmDescription: This will replace the current local data with the imported content.
settings.devToolsDescription: Preview and test the local experience without touching your live data.

sleepSegments.crossMidnightNotice: This sleep started on {{startDate}} and continued into {{endDate}}.

statistics.heroDescription: Monitor your baby's routines with a premium overview of sleep, feeding, diapers and growth.
statistics.overviewDescription: Switch between today, the last 7 days and the last 30 days to review the full picture.
statistics.zeroChartData: Records exist, but there is no measurable chart value for this period.
statistics.diaperHint: Use the trend to spot when a change is overdue.
statistics.growthEmptyDescription: Add a growth measurement to start tracking progress.
statistics.smartInsightsDescription: Friendly, rule-based insights based on recent patterns.
statistics.insightSleepLonger: Baby slept {{percent}}% longer than the previous window.
statistics.insightSleepShorter: Baby slept {{percent}}% less than the previous window.
statistics.insightWakeWindow: Average wake window is about {{minutes}} minutes.
statistics.insightBottleMore: Bottle feeding increased by {{percent}}% compared to the previous window.
statistics.insightBottleLess: Bottle feeding decreased by {{percent}}% compared to the previous window.
statistics.insightDiaperGap: No diaper change was recorded for over {{hours}} hours.
statistics.insightLiveDiaper: The last diaper change was {{duration}} ago.
statistics.insightAverageDiaperInterval: The average interval between changes in this period is {{duration}}.
statistics.insightBaseline: Keep logging sleep, feeds and diaper changes to build a fuller picture.

featurePages.historyDescription: Activities in the selected period. Select an item to view or edit it.
featurePages.noHistory: No valid activities in this period.

sleepPage.title: Sleep
sleepPage.description: Track current sleep, review day and night patterns, and manage past sessions.
sleepPage.latest: Awake for {{duration}} since the latest recorded sleep.
sleepPage.noSleep: No sleep records in this period.
sleepPage.premiumDescription: Daily charts and advanced personalized sleep insights are available with Premium.

feedingPage.title: Feeding
feedingPage.description: Track breastfeeding and bottles with one combined, editable history.
feedingPage.noFeeds: No feeding records in this period.
feedingPage.premiumDescription: Daily feeding charts and extended neutral insights are available with Premium.

healthPage.title: Health & care
healthPage.description: Keep diaper, medicine and bath records together without medical recommendations.
healthPage.averageDiaperInsight: The average interval between diaper changes in this period is {{duration}}.
healthPage.moreDiaperData: Record at least two diaper changes to calculate an interval.
healthPage.noBaths: No baths recorded in this period.
healthPage.premiumDescription: Detailed comparisons and extended rule-based care insights are available with Premium.

notificationsCenter.title: Notifications
notificationsCenter.basedOnDiaper: Based on last diaper change at {{time}}
notificationsCenter.fallbackSchedule: No previous activity recorded — using reminder start time

reminders.title: Reminders & notifications
reminders.description: Create deterministic local reminders for your baby's daily routine.

permission.default: Permission has not been requested. BabyNest asks only after you press the button.
permission.denied: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Change the site permission to enable them.
permission.unsupported: This browser does not support notifications. Reminders remain available in the app.

reminders.advancedDescription: Activity-aware timing, sleep prediction and extended reminder insights are Premium features.
reminders.validationFuture: Select a valid future date and time.

routine.useAdaptiveFeedingInterval: Adapt from feeding history when enough data is available
routine.useAdaptiveDiaperInterval: Adapt from diaper history when enough data is available
routine.changeLater: Choose the usual interval. You can change it later in the baby profile.
routine.feedingQuestion: How often does the baby usually feed?
routine.diaperQuestion: How often do you usually check or change the diaper?
routine.validationInterval: Enter an interval between 15 and 1440 minutes.
routine.notMedicalAdvice: These values personalize reminders and estimates; they are not medical advice.

countries.OTHER: Other / My country is not listed

vaccinations.regionRequired: Select a province to load the correct schedule.
vaccinations.countryDisclaimer: This informational schedule was reviewed against an official public-health source. Confirm every dose and change with your pediatrician.
vaccinations.countryQuestion: Which country's vaccination schedule does the baby follow?
vaccinations.countryHelper: We use the selected country to show an informational vaccination schedule. Confirm dates with your pediatrician.
vaccinations.plannedRegenerated: {{removed}} untouched planned entries removed; {{added}} planned entries added
vaccinations.reminderImpact: Reminders for replaced planned entries will be reconciled.
vaccinations.countryChangeDisclaimer: Official schedules may change. Review this change with your pediatrician or local health authority.
vaccinations.unsupportedMessage: BabyNest does not have an official schedule for this country yet. Existing records are preserved and vaccinations can be managed manually.
vaccinations.conflictMessage: This record may correspond to the selected schedule. Review it with your pediatrician.
vaccinations.title: Vaccination Center
vaccinations.premiumDescription: Completion statistics and deterministic insights are available with Premium+.
vaccinations.disclaimer: Schedule dates are informational estimates based on the Bulgarian 2026 calendar. Confirm every vaccine and conditional schedule with your pediatrician.

vaccines.hexavalent: Diphtheria, tetanus, pertussis, polio, hepatitis B and Hib
vaccines.pentavalent: Diphtheria, tetanus, pertussis, polio and Hib

milestones.statisticsDisclaimer: These counts describe parent-recorded observations and are not a developmental score.
milestones.title: Development milestones
milestones.description: Record skills and personal moments as parent observations — without scores or diagnoses.
milestones.correctedAgeInfo: Corrected age is shown as informational context for babies born early through 24 months.
milestones.parentConcernMessage: Consider discussing this observation with your pediatrician.
milestones.sourceDisclaimer: Milestone records reflect parent observations and are not a clinical assessment.
milestones.guidance: Every child develops in their own way and the sequence may vary.
milestones.dateFuture: The date cannot be in the future.
milestones.dateOrder: The observed date cannot be before the first-noticed date.

items.social-smile: Smiles when you talk or smile
items.head-up-tummy: Holds head up during tummy time
items.responds-name: Looks when their name is called
items.babbling: Makes repeated sounds such as bababa
items.mama-dada: Uses mama or dada as a name
items.puts-in-container: Puts an object in a container

memories.title: Memories & Baby Book
memories.description: A private digital diary built from everyday care, milestones and family moments.
memories.automaticDescription: A special moment recorded in BabyNest.
memories.empty: No memories match this view yet.
memories.search: Search title, tags, month, year, activity or milestone
memories.albumsPremiumDescription: Automatic and custom albums are available with Premium+.
memories.invalidDate: Choose a valid date that is not in the future.
memories.photoPremiumLimit: Free accounts can attach one offline photo per memory.
memories.photoTooLarge: Each offline photo must be smaller than 3 MB.
memories.photoError: The photo could not be read.
memories.offlinePhotoInfo: Photos are stored on this device. Cloud backup can be connected later.

story.title: Today's BabyNest story
story.empty: Today is ready for its next little story.
story.disclaimer: This story is generated locally with fixed rules from recorded data.

dashboard.title: A memory from your Baby Book

book.subtitle: A book of little beginnings and family stories
book.premiumDescription: Printable layouts and PDF export are available with Premium+.

family.title: Family Sharing
family.description: Coordinate baby care with the people you trust, with clear roles and permissions.
family.membersDescription: Shared access is controlled by capabilities, not page-specific role checks.
family.invalidCode: The code is invalid or expired.
family.premiumDescription: Multiple members, permissions, invitation management and audit history are available with Premium+.

coach.title: What may be useful now
coach.disclaimer: Suggestions are generated locally from your records using fixed rules. They are informational and are not medical advice or a diagnosis.

rules.medicationBody: Review the recorded reminder before taking action.
rules.medicationEvidence: Evidence: the reminder “{{title}}” is due or approaching.
rules.concernBody: Keep your note available and consider discussing it with your pediatrician.
rules.concernEvidence: Evidence: a milestone is marked as a parent concern.
rules.vaccineBody: Check the recorded schedule and confirm the timing with your pediatrician.
rules.vaccineEvidence: Evidence: {{name}} has reached its recorded planned date.
rules.sleepingBody: The next-nap estimate is paused while sleep is being recorded.
rules.sleepingEvidence: Evidence: an active sleep timer is running.
rules.napTitle: A sleep window may be approaching
rules.napBody: Watch for your baby's usual sleepy cues.
rules.napEvidence: Evidence: the estimate uses {{samples}} recorded wake windows and points to about {{minutes}} minutes.
rules.feedingTitle: A feeding check may be useful
rules.feedingBody: Use your baby's cues and your recorded routine as context.
rules.feedingEvidence: Evidence: the recorded routine window is in about {{minutes}} minutes.
rules.diaperTitle: A diaper check may be useful
rules.diaperBody: The recorded routine interval is approaching.
rules.diaperEvidence: Evidence: the recorded routine window is in about {{minutes}} minutes.
rules.growthBody: You can review the descriptive change alongside earlier entries.
rules.growthEvidence: Evidence: the latest growth entry is dated {{date}}.
rules.emergingTitle: A skill is marked as emerging
rules.emergingBody: Add a note when you notice something new.
rules.emergingEvidence: Evidence: an observation is currently marked as emerging.
rules.milestoneBody: You can add a date or note while the details are fresh.
rules.milestoneEvidence: Evidence: a milestone is marked as observed.
rules.memoryBody: You can add a photo or details while the moment is fresh.
rules.memoryEvidence: Evidence: a recent memory is available in the Baby Book.
rules.generalBody: Continue recording only what is useful for your family.
rules.generalEvidence: Evidence: {{count}} activities are available for this baby.

doctorReport.title: Doctor Report
doctorReport.description: Prepare a clear summary of your baby's recorded routine before a pediatric appointment.
doctorReport.disclaimer: This report summarizes parent-recorded information and is not a medical diagnosis.
doctorReport.exportError: The PDF could not be generated. Make sure the local ReportLab service is available.
doctorReport.premiumDescription: PDF export is available with Premium+.

labels.sleepRecorded: Sleep records were available for the selected period.
labels.feedingRecorded: Feeding activity was recorded in the selected period.
labels.diaperRecorded: Diaper changes were recorded without an automatic medical interpretation.
labels.noActivities: No activities were recorded in the selected period.

growth.noInsights: Add more measurements to unlock insights.

growth.noHeightData: No height data for this period
growth.noHeadData: No head circumference data for this period
